rules.description: WAF rule sets are constantly updated to guard against new attacks. Upgrading to the latest DRS version will provide enhanced engine performance, better protection, and a reduction in false positives. It is recommended to use the latest DRS rule set version.
rules.query: extend ruleset1=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[0], ruleset2=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[1], ruleSetType1=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[0].ruleSetType, ruleSetType2=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[1].ruleSetType | where (sku.name !~ "Classic_AzureFrontDoor") and (ruleSetType1 =~ "Microsoft_DefaultRuleSet" and (ruleset1["ruleSetVersion"] in ("1.0","1.1","2.0"))) or (ruleSetType2 =~ "Microsoft_DefaultRuleSet" and (ruleset2["ruleSetVersion"] in ("1.0","1.1","2.0")))
rules.fix: use the latest DRS rule set version

ARM_Fix.details: In properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets, update the Microsoft_DefaultRuleSet entry's ruleSetVersion from '1.0', '1.1', or '2.0' to '2.1'. Retain any bot-manager rule set entries unchanged.

TF_Fix.details: In the managed_rule_set blocks, update the Microsoft_DefaultRuleSet entry's version from '1.0', '1.1', or '2.0' to '2.1'. Retain any bot_manager_rule_set blocks unchanged.
